item.title: Russia shrugs off Trumpâs tariff threats on those who provide oil to Cuba
item.description: The comments came in response to a question about whether Russia was concerned about the Trump administration's tariff threats.

item.title: House votes to override Trump's Canada tariffs
item.description: Republican House leaders tried, and failed, to pass a measure on Tuesday that would have blocked House disapproval votes on Trump tariffs through July...

item.title: After weeks of tension, Trump is still talking tough on Iran. Here's what could happen next
Epstein files: AG Pam Bondi seemed to have Rep. Jayapal's DOJ database search history at hearing
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi at a House Judiciary Committee hearing seemed to have a printout of Rep. Jayapal's search history related to Epstein.

item.title: SAVE Act: House advances Trump-backed voter ID bill
item.description: The SAVE America Act's GOP supporters say it would secure elections and prevent fraud. Democrats say it could disenfranchise millions.
